basic_details.job_title: ICAR CRRI Laboratory Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR Central Rice Research Institute (ICAR CRRI)
basic_details.short_information: ICAR Central Rice Research Institute (ICAR CRRI) Laboratory Assistant (LA) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://icar-nrri.in/. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR CRRI Laboratory Assistant (LA) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Relaxation for SC, ST and OBC candidates as per Govt. of India norms.

selection_process: Written-cum-personal interview Screening test (if large number of candidates)

content_sections.heading: ICAR CRRI Laboratory Assistant (LA) Recruitment 2026 - Overview
ICAR CRRI Laboratory Assistant (LA) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR CRRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICAR CRRI Laboratory Assistant (LA) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR CRRI Laboratory Assistant (LA) Vacancy Details 2026
Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Relaxation for SC, ST and OBC candidates as per Govt. of India norms.

content_sections.heading: ICAR CRRI Laboratory Assistant (LA) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written-cum-personal interview Screening test (if large number of candidates)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICAR CRRI Laboratory Assistant (LA) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR CRRI Laboratory Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date, which is 27 July 2026. There is no separate application submission deadline before the walk-in.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Laboratory Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Agriculture, Microbiology, Biotechnology, Botany, or Zoology to be eligible for the Laboratory Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Laboratory Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 18,000 per month for the Laboratory Assistant position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Laboratory Assistant post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Laboratory Assistant post is between 18 years and 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC, ST, and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Laboratory Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Laboratory Assistant (LA) post at ICAR Central Rice Research Institute.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the ICAR CRRI Laboratory Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Laboratory Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written-cum-personal interview. A screening test may be conducted if there is a large number of applicants.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at ICAR Central Rice Research Institute, Cuttack, Odisha. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs. A duly filled application form may also be required.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: The job is contractual in nature, as indicated by the recruitment details. It is a contractual position for the Laboratory Assistant post.
